files.patch: @@ -5891,0 +5891,3 @@ + If the frame's method is a value object constructor and + the requested local is the "this" object then the + value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. @@ -5944,0 +5947,2 @@ + If the frame's method is a value object constructor then the + value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object.
